After finding out about Yousuke's magic ability the moment she came into Takafumi's apartment, she starts spending her days at Takafumi's apartment and together, they spend their days watching replays of Yousuke's adventures in the other world.
(Source: Isekai Ojisan Wiki and Wikipedia)

name: Mabel Rayveil
about:
A member of an illustrious guardian family, the Frost Clan, and guardian of the family heirloom the Frost Sword, who befriends Uncle.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Nano Eiai
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: March 14th (Pisces)
A first year student at Ohananomitsu High School, an alumnus of Mirei Middle School, and Aijou Rentarou's fourth girlfriend. She is focused on being practical and efficient with everything she does, to the point where she disregards the "useless" emotions of herself and others. Due to this, she comes off as unfeeling or uncaring to others.
Nano is the smartest among the girls. In her school exam, she gets the perfect score (700/700), which is better than the scores of genius-level characters in other manga. Nano has memorized hundreds of digits of Pi, which she sometimes uses to calm herself down. Due to her extreme intelligence and efficiency, in most difficult situations Nano is the first to come up with solutions. However, her solutions are sometimes brutal due to her lack of social experience.
Due to her extreme intelligence and efficiency, Nano has much information like a walking encyclopedia.
Nano has acrophobia; a fear of heights.
She also has proficiency in hand-to-hand combat and melee weapons, particularly boxcutters.
Name/Birthday Pun Explanation:
Eiai means "flourish, prosperity, honor, glory, splendor" (栄) (ei) and "meeting, tryst, date, rendezvous" (逢) (ai).
Nano means "calm, lull" (凪) (na) and "from" (乃) (no).
Eiai being pronounced as “A.I.” (Artificial Intelligence), and Nano reference to Nanotechnology because of her personality.
Nano's birthday is on March 14, a reference to the constant number of pi (π ≈ 3.14).
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki)

name: Hakari Hanazono
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: June 22nd (Gemini)
A first year student at Ohananomitsu High School in Class 1-4 as well as Aijou Rentarou's first girlfriend (alongside Inda Karane). Although appearing prim and proper on the outside, she often thinks of "lewd" things that she wants to do with her boyfriend.
Hakari loves Rentarou. She is classified as a deredere with her cheerful, kind, and loving personality, being also quite lustful. Having a strong sex drive when near Rentarou.
Being, along with Inda Karane, Rentarou's first two girlfriends, they tend to spend a lot of time together. Due to the immense longing and love they feel for Rentarou, they have come to kiss each other unconsciously, while thinking about him. Hakari often becomes jealous when the other girls kiss him, demanding to be kissed in compensation.
Due to her perverted side, she often fantasizes about Rentarou, going so far as to kiss the first person or object next to him, while thinking about him, with Karane being the main victim of this behavior.
Name/Birthday Pun Explanation:
Hanazono (花園) means "flower, blossom" (花) (hana) and "garden, park, plantation" (園) (sono/zono).
This is a reference to the phrase "頭がお花畑 (Atama ga Ohanabatake)" literally meaning "flower garden in the head", used to refer to someone who has constant delusions and fantasies.
Hakari's birthday is on June 22nd. This is a reference to her distinctive laughter style, むふふ (mufufu), or "mwehehe" in the official translations, being a Goroawase (wordplay) for 622.
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki)

name: Karane Inda
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 16 
Birthday: September 9th, 2002
Zodiac: Virgo
Height: 5'4
Eye Color: Hazel
Hair Color: Gold
Karane Inda is Rentarou's first lover along with her friend Hakari.
She is a 1st year, class 4 student at Ohananomitsu High School sharing a class with Rentarou, Hakari, Shizuka, Nano and Meme.
Karane has orange-blonde hair tied into twin tails. Her school outfit consists of a brown sweater over a white dress shirt, a short skirt, and loose knee-high socks. She is quoted to be beautiful with desirable features.
Karane is known for being straightforward and honest about how she feels about a given situation except for two subjects: her feminine figure (or supposed lack of) and her deep love for Aijou Rentarou.
Her desperate attempts to hide how she feels about a given situation despite her honest nature often make people think she is going to strike them. She can be described as a tsundere.
Karane is currently the strongest of Rentarou's (pure determination) girlfriends even being able to go toe to toe with the leader of the Gorira Alliance. She is also shown be above average in academics even being one place ahead of Rentarou.
Inda means "hospital" (院) (in) and "field, rice paddy" (田) (ta/da).
Karane means "Tang, China" (唐) (kara) and "sound" (音) (ne).
Her full name is a reference to a common sentence ending that tsunderes use in Japanese. (別にあんたのためにやってないんだからね! betsu ni anta no tame ni yattena*in dakarane*!) ("It's not like I did it for you or anything!")
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki)

name: Kusuri Yakuzen
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 18
Birthday: April 18th (Aries)
A third year student at Ohananomitsu High School in Class 3-3, the President of the Chemistry Club, and Aijou Rentarou's 5th girlfriend.
She loves to make drugs, always making them or using them in almost any situation; however, she tends not to realize the possible danger or consequences that these can have.
Kusuri is energetic and ingenuitive. She is capable of creating a drug for almost anything. She doesn't tend to be concerned about the dangers of the drugs she makes and will often happily force them upon others as guinea pig or take them herself without hesitation. Most of the time she ends her sentences with "-nanoda".
In her normal teenage form, Kusuri has turquoise eyes and long, wavy red hair she keeps in a ponytail. She wears glasses, has a slender build, a large bust, and a beauty mark on the left side of her bust.
However, due to a having consumed a drug that was supposed to make her immortal, she spends much of her time in an eight-year-old body. In this form, her body is smaller, her hair is shorter, and she does not need her glasses.
Name/Birthday Pun Explanation:
Kusuri (楠莉) is a homophone of the Japanese word for medicine or drug, kusuri (薬).
Yakuzen (薬膳) literally translates to "medicinal cooking".
Kusuri's birthday is on April 18th. This was declared Invention Day in Japan in 1954 to commemorate the first substantial patent law established in 1885.
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki)

name: Shizuka Yoshimoto
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: November 1st (Scorpio)
A first year student at Ohananomitsu High School in Class 1-4 as well as Aijou Rentarou's third girlfriend. A member of the library committee, she is shy and almost completely mute, relying on books (and later, a text-to-speech app) to communicate instead.
Yoshimoto Shizuka is really cute and petite. She is 16-year-old girl with fluffy, waist-length hair that is charcoal-blue in color. Her petite size tends to cause people to think she is a young child, despite being the same age as Rentarou and the other classmates.
Shizuka is rather timid especially given her rather quiet or mute voice which makes her rather distant from other people. However, ever since she met Rentarou she has become braver, even willing to sacrifice her own safety to help Hakari out. She is also the most modest of Rentarou's girlfriends as she doesn't like being dirty-minded. She even refused to peep on him when he was taking a bath and even tried to stop them from doing so.
Shizuka is the weakest and frailest among the girls. Her petite body is so light that a gust of wind is sometimes strong enough to blow her away and always get drowned while trying to swim at the pool without a swimming tube. However, combined with her cuteness like a little animal, she is able to make these her strong point. Like in Chapter 16, where Shizuka's cuteness and frailty was able to defy the natural instinct of the Hanazono Family's dog.
Name/Birthday Pun Explanation:
Yoshimoto (好本) uses the kanjis for "to like, to love" (好き) (suki) and "book" (本) (hon).
Shizuka (静) means "quiet" (静か) (shizuka).
Shizuka's birthday is on November 1st. This is recognised by the Japanese Anniversary Association as "Book Day (本の日) (Hon no hi)", as the number 1 looks like books on a bookshelf.
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki, edited)

name: Asakawa
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about: The girl who rejected main character Rentarou Aijou's 100th love confession.

name: Hahari Hanazono
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 29
Birthday: May 12th (Taurus)
The mother of Hanazono Hakari.
She tries her best to appear calm and mature for the sake of her daughter, warding off anything that might hurt or corrupt her. She also has a uncontrollable love for cute things.
Hahari is a very beautiful young woman whose features are similar to Hanazono Hakari as they both share the same pink hair that has flowery hair ornaments, green eyes and a voluptuous figure. However, the only difference is that Hahari has ankle-length hair that is split in the middle with bangs hanging on the right side and chest-length hair strands resting on either side while the tips of her hair are curled in a ringlet, and she has a mole under her left eye.
Name/Birthday Pun Explanation:
Hanazono means "flower, blossom" (花) (hana) and "garden, park, plantation" (園) (sono/zono).
Hahari means "feather" (羽) (ha) and "village" (里) (ri), Hahari is also a play on Hakari's name along with Haha, which can also mean "mother" (母) (haha).
Hahari's birthday is on May 12th.
On May 12th 1948, Japan started using "Maternal and Child Health Handbooks (母子手帳) (Boshi techou)", a small notebook to record the health of mothers and their children during and after pregnancy.
May 12th is also the date of the first ever International Mother's Day in 1907.
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki, edited)

name: Meme Kakure
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Kakure Meme is the 11th girlfriend.
Meme has dark hair that reaches her mid-back, along with long straight-cut bangs that completely cover her eyes. She has a mole near her mouth, as well as a similar mole beneath her left ear. She wears a modest turtleneck beneath her school blazer and dark pantyhose. She also wears a minimizing bra to conceal the size of her chest.
Meme is extremely shy, to the point of wearing masks to hide her face in order to avoid drawing attention to herself. Meme also enjoys knitting and spends time knitting a lot of little stuffed animals. She uses these stuffed animals for "misdirection," in which she runs away quickly and leaves a stuffed animal as a distraction so no one sees where she went.
Kakure uses (華)(Ka) meaning "Splendor or Flashiness and (暮)(Kure) meaning "Sunset".
Kakure is a homophone for the Japanese word for "to hide", (隠れ)(kakure).
Meme uses (愛)(Me) meaning "Love or Affection" and the Noma Kanji (々), which repeats the previous Kanji.
Me is also a homophone for the Japanese word for 'eye', (目)(me).
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki, edited)

name: Mei Meido
series: Kimi no Koto ga Daidaidaidaidaisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo
about:
Age: 19
Birthday: May 10th (Taurus)
Mei has dark hair that is styled neatly and held back by a white veil. She is usually smiling, has her eyes closed, and is almost always seen in her maid uniform.
Mei is polite and proper, rarely showing strong emotions. She is very loyal to Hahari above all else and is unlikely to do anything unless given permission or ordered to by Hahari specifically. Mei's fanatical loyalty to the Rentarou Family and the Hanazono Household results in her gladly offering to "eliminate" people that threaten, insult, or even mildly inconvenience Rentarou, Hahari, or the other girlfriends.
Name/Birthday Pun Explanation:
Meido (銘戸) is a homophone for "maid" (メイド) (meido).
Mei's birthday is on May 10th. This is a pun on Meido, "Mei" being "May" and "do" being Goroawase (wordplay) for the number 10.
(Source: 100Kanojo Wiki, edited)

name: Kirara
about:
The main character of the series.
A girl who has no parents and has been raised by people around in a remote village. From her childhood, She has a mysterious power that allows "people to feel the connection between people."
A legendary summoner who woke up to the ability to use the legendary summoning magic "call" after encountering her friends Lamp and Match.

name: Riko Suminoe
about:
Birthday: November 7
Weight: 38.33 KG (OVA 7)
Height: 145 cm 
Riko is the younger twin sister. A way to tell her apart from Ako is that she wears her hair in a ponytail, and it is longer than her sister's hair. Also, she has a bandage below her left eye. She has a habit of answering truthfully but very bluntly, causing everyone else to jump to conclusions, even at one time about to honestly state that she and her sister wanted a computer solely for porn, however was quickly stopped by Ako. She is much shyer in person than her sister, as she could not kiss Keita in front of others. At school, she is on the disciplinary committee, where she uses a bokken/shinai to punish the students and she has more of a strict personality, yet just like her sister will abuse her authority to get Keita.

name: Ako Suminoe
about:
Birthday: November 7
Weight: 38.40 KG (OVA 7)
Height: 145 cm (OVA 7)
Ako is the elder twin sister. A way to tell her apart from Riko is that she wears a hair clip to keep the hair off her forehead. She has a reliable, level-headed personality, but can be sullen, moody, even a bit childish and is quickly embarrassed. She carries herself differently than her sister, is more skilled in cooking which she learned to help her mom out with the housework, and is strong with alcohol which she sometimes uses to her advantage to knock out Riko to have the livelier Keita all to herself. She is a closet pervert and more often planning her seduction of Keita, even hiding porn magazines in her room. At school, she is on the school committee, but has a habit of abusing her authority to get Keita.

name: Yuuzuki Kiryuu
about:
She is Mikazuki's older sister, the new teacher to Gakushū Senior High and homeroom teacher to Keita and Miharu, who in an earlier chapter was a clothing store clerk because she liked western style clothing. Through bad timing and unaware that Keita and his sisters are not related by blood, she believes that he is a deviant who dates multiple girls while having an incestuous relationship with his sisters. She becomes excited by her exaggerated ideas of what he and his sisters do at home or with other girls. Through these beliefs, she tries to recruit Miharu, believing she is one of the girls Keita is dating, to have them go on a date to separate him from his sisters. She is a virgin, however after clearing everything up, she starts to have growing feelings for Keita as well that goes to a lustful desire, practically raping his P.E. clothes as she is addicted to the scent of his sweat and fantasizing them having sex. She is a closet fujoshi (female otaku) with a samurai  fetish, and also likes to cosplay. Due to this, she spends so much money on otaku goods that she usually eats instant noodles. This is also why she no longer lives with her parents, as her mother would disown her if she continued with her otaku ways. The sisters see her as a possible threat for Keita's heart because they believe he has fetish for older woman, and the fact that she has a much bigger bust than them. She also mistakenly believes because of all of the outfits the twins usually wear solely to get Keita's attention that they might be just like her.
In the anime, she is already the twin's homeroom teacher before Keita graduated. 
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Mikazuki Kiryuu
about:
Age: 14
She is an underclassman that is "chasing after him (Keita)". They were in the same sports club back at his old school. She is even more perverted than Ako and Riko when it comes to getting Keita's attention, with no qualms of flashing her privates at him in front of others. She is also a bit of an airhead, believing that Miharu and Keita are no longer virgins when she found them hugging. Yuuzuki's is her older sister, usually referring to her in private as "my otaku sister", who Mikazuki looks up to and loves very dearly, even stating once the visual novel she bought was for her to cover for her sister. However, she also enjoys taking lewd pictures of her sister in cosplay as compensation for covering for her. She was able to correctly assume that her sister has feelings for Keita.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Miharu Mikuni
about:
A teenage girl that was introduced in chapter 18 where she returned Keita's acceptance letter when she found her dog trying to bury it in her yard. Out of a combination of stress from believing he did not get in to the relief he found out he did get in, Keita hugs her out of the blue. After that action she has shown an attraction towards Keita, often blushing when they talk and feeling very comfortable when he hugs her, but overall states she has nothing to do with him. Though it is obvious she is attracted to him, keeping her distance because of his sisters as well as her own inexperience being around boys, even fantasizing him raping her and experiencing an orgasm from him giving her a piggy back ride. Even though she does not go after him, his sisters still see her as a possible threat for Keita's heart. It is noted from Keita that she has a bigger bust than his sisters when he recalls the first hug they shared. She is currently in Gakushū Senior High and in the same class as Keita. People often mistake her being involved with Keita and will most of the time become caught in the cross fire of many of the twins' antics (which she comments on in chapter 25). She is the only girl Keita gets nervous around, suggesting he might have feelings for her. She has a weak bladder and occasionally wets herself, including once in front of Keita, but he promises to keep it a secret.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kotoko Iwanaga
about:
Kotoko is the current girlfriend of Kuro Sakuragawa. She is known as the "Goddess of Wisdom."
She has a very outgoing personality and always makes an effort to find the root of any problem, especially when she has the help of youkai. She is oblivious to danger and she tends to be very clingy when it comes to Kuro.
(Source: Fandom Wiki)

name: Karin Nanase
about:
Karin Nanase, née Haruko, Nanase was a gravure idol who gained a niche after starring in a late night tv drama. She died under mysterious circumstances and became the basis of the Steel Lady Nanase rumors.
She has a well-endowed figure and long purple hair, tied into two ponytails at the base of her head. Nanase also has massive breasts.
Haruko Nanase was just a simple high schooler girl when she was spotted and scouted by a idol manager who decided to make her an idol due to her enormous breasts. She started doing mostly gravure shoots, but eventually got her big break with a tv show using both her likeness and song.
After the untimely death of her father and the release of his notes accusing her of murder, Haruko was hounded by the media and forced to spend time away from the spotlight. During this time, she would stay hidden shifting from hotel to hotel. One rainy night, she went out to an abandoned construction site to smoke, consumed with guilt. When a pile of old steel beams became unstable and hurtled towards her, she let them crush her without resistance.
She was a kind, soft-spoken person. She still cares even to that about her abusive father and still delivers him food after he and her mother divorce. She smokes when she gets depressed. She was also considered extremely intelligent as she passed a prestigious university entrance exam on the first try.
(Source: Kyokou Suiri Wiki)

name: Rikka Sakuragawa
about: Rikka Sakuragawa is Kuro Sakuragawa's older cousin and the reason he visited the hospital as regularly as he did.

name: Steel Lady Nanase
about:
Steel Lady Nanase is an urban legend of the vengeful spirit that haunts the Makurazaka town, based on the untimely death of idol Karin Nanase.
(Source: Kyokou Suiri Wiki)
No voice actors have been added to this character. Help improve our database by searching for a voice actor, and adding this character to their roles .

name: Aoi Tanio
about:
Aoi Tanio is a woman convicted of murder and the reason that Guardian Serpent of Tsukana Swamp requested the help of Kotoko Iwanaga in Chapter 15 of the Manga and Episode 2 of the Anime.
She is the main suspect of a murder for disposing a dead body into the Tsukuna Swamp. Furthermore, the serpent claims to have heard her utters: "I really hope they find it," after disposing the body.

name: Chika Komari
about:
Birthday: March 29
Height: 148 cm
Weight: 41 kg
One of the loser heroines and another classmate of Kazuhiko. A member of the literature club, she is shy and has a hard time talking to others. She's had a long-lasting crush on Shintarō Tamaki, who has remained completely oblivious due to her not being able to confess sooner.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Lemon Yakishio
about:
Birthday: August 1
Height: 163 cm
Weight: 50 kg
One of the loser heroines and another classmate of Kazuhiko. She is the ace of the track and field club, and like Yanami, is also popular. She's also in love with her childhood friend Mitsuki Ayano, who already has a girlfriend.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Anna Yanami
about:
Birthday: November 29
Height: 156 cm
One of the loser heroines. She is the popular girl in Kazuhiko's class with a bright and charming personality. Though she's often the target of many other boys' affections, she's had a long-lasting crush on her childhood friend Sōsuke Hakamada, who never reciprocated her feelings at all and instead started dating her rival Karen Himemiya, much to her frustration and inner jealousy. She is a glutton and is often seen eating.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Konami Amanatsu
about: Teacher of the class 1-C.

name: Tiara Basori
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: N/A
Tiara Basori (sometimes mistranslated as Basori Teiara) is a supporting character of Too Many Losing Heroines! series. In her debut, she's introduced as a first-year student of the Tsuwabuki High School and also the Vice-President of the Student Council.
(Source: Makeine Wiki)

name: Hibari Houkobaru
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: N/A
Hibari Hokobaru is a supporting character of Too Many Losing Heroines! series. She's a second-year student of the Tsuwabuki High School and also the President of the Tsuwabuki High School Student Council. She is also the cousin of Student Council Treasurer, Hiroto Sakurai.

name: Sayo Konuki
about: Nurse of the school and old classmate of Konami Amanatsu. She likes to secretly record student conversations and listen to them later to see which to students are interested in each other.

name: Kaju Nukumizu
about:
Birthday: June 6
Height: 147 cm
Weight: 40 kg
A second-year middle school student who is Kazuhiko's little sister and makes fun of her older brother's lack of friends.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Yumeko Shikiya
about: A second-year high school student who serves as the student council secretary. She is a gyaru with a flashy appearance, but unlike her appearance, she is low-key.

name: Koto Tsukinoki
about: Koto Tsukinoki is a third year and the vice president of the literature club.

name: Mashiro Mitsumine
about:
Age: 9
Hakuya's younger sister, who somehow manages to enroll in Kobeni's class. She often tries to vocalize that she isn't a child, but her honest feelings over her likes and dislikes are often read easily by the others. She is quite fearful of Benio but is easily swayed by sweet things.

name: Kobeni Yonomori
about: The main heroine, a responsible sixteen-year-old who handles cooking and chores well.

name: Benio Yonomori
about:
Benio is Kobeni's elder sister. She has two personas: an immature and carefree loving sister at home and a demure, elegant, and well-mannered top performing student in school, where she is the student council president and maintains a respectable popular image.
She has taken a liking to Mashiro, and would do all sorts of advances to her at home.

name: Nadeshiko Kashima
about:
The student council vice president. She is much more refined and mature than Benio (who is the student council president). She is always the one who keeps Benio in-check whenever she is getting out of control. Benio often calls her up whenever she is feeling down, even if the cause isn't that bad. This is much to Kashima's annoyance—so much so that she often hangs up.
(Source: Anime+)

name: Shirayuki Mitsumine
about: Hakuya and Mashiro's mother.

name: Mayura Momouchi
about: Kobeni's classmate and best friend.

name: Niko Oono
about: A journalist working for the school paper. She tries to dig up info on Kobeni and Mashiro, at first at the beckoning of Konoha, but later decides she wants to do it anyway because it could mean becoming the president of the school paper if she writes an interesting enough article.

name: Konoha Suetsugi
about:
She is the student council secretary. She idolizes Benio due to how nice Benio was towards her when she first moved into town. As a result, she studied hard to get into the same school, and managed to work her way into the student council to be near Benio.
She hates Mashiro due to how close the latter seems with Benio, and even after Mashiro gets into a rant about how much she hates being smothered by her, Konoha refuses to see Benio in a bad light.

name: Chitoge Kirisaki
about:
Age: 15-17
Birthday: June 7
Height: 160 cm
Blood type: B
Likes: Raku Ichijou, ramen, her ribbon
Dislikes: Claude's over-protectiveness, being called a gorilla by Raku, Dorayaki
Abilities: Immense Strength, Great Agility
Weakness: awful cooking, lightning, darkness
The female lead of Nisekoi. She is the daughter of the lead of the Bee Hive Gangsters and is in a fake relationship with Ichijo Raku.
Chitoge is very smart and completely fluent in both English and Japanese despite growing up in America. She is half-Japanese. She is somewhat forgetful, aggressive and quick to attack someone who gets on her nerves. Once you get to know her though, she becomes very talkative and friendly.
She is very bad at cooking because she never measures ingredients and adds random things she thinks will make the dish taste better. She is very athletic as she can easily jump over the school's walls and swim 25 meters in a couple of seconds.
Ever since she was a child she has had a hard time making friends as others were afraid of her gangster family and as a result she had a cold demeanor toward people at the start of the series due to Claude's over protectiveness. This led her to create notebooks filled with information on classmates in an attempt to make friends.
(Source: Nisekoi Wiki)

name: Kosaki Onodera
about:
Age: 15-17
Birthday: June 15
Blood Type: O
Height: 157 cm
Likes: Raku Ichijou, animals
Abilities: Natural Affinity for Animals, Japanese sweets 
She is one of the main characters in the manga series Nisekoi. She is shown to have a crush on Raku Ichijou, the male protagonist of Nisekoi, and is also the only girl that Ichijou openly has feelings for. 
Onodera is discreet, innocent, and slightly timid. She is very kind, she takes care of Ichijou when he is wounded or ill. Generally, she opts to think carefully before acting, as seen when she stalls her confession to Ichijou in consideration that he may have feelings for Kirisaki.
In confrontation with Ichijou, Onodera lacks confidence, initially needing encouragement from Miyamoto to attempt confessing her love.
Onodera works well with her classmates, possessing close friends and being the most popular girl for the boys before Kirisaki transferred and after Kirisaki and Ichijou allegedly began dating. 
Both Kosaki and Ichijou are completely unaware that the feelings they hold for each other are mutual. Like in many average fictional love stories, these two try not to show their feelings to each other. She loves Raku because he is kind and caring. Just like the other girls who like him, she can be jealous as well but not to the point of having bloodlust. She often worries/wonders whether Raku and Chitoge's "fake relationship" is actually developing into something more than just that. 
Chitoge and Onodera have a really trusting relationship. It can even be considered that they are best friends since Chitoge only tells her problems to her (except in some cases, Raku as well). Despite her knowing that Chitoge and Raku are only pretending to date, she at times can't help but be suspicious of their relationship. 
(Source: Nisekoi Wikia)

name: Suzu Ayakaji
about: She is a classmate and friend of Haru Onodera.

name: Kyouko Hihara
about:
English teacher of first year, class C. She has appeared since the first story. A rough character.
She appears beautiful and looks mature. She has cherry eyes and short green hair and wears v neck blue coloured uniform and light brown pants.
She is a very supportive character and always helps her students. In an episode, it is shown that she and her female students bathe together showing her deep affection.

name: Shinobu Honda
about: Honda is Marika's personal attendant and police escort. She monitors Marika and at times advises her to not overexert herself due to her frail condition.

name: Hana Kirisaki
about: Hana is a world renowned business consultant who keeps much of the world's finances in balance, and she's the mother of Chitoge.  Hana is extremely busy, feared and respected around the world. Behind her tough exterior she has a caring side that demonstrates her love for her daughter.

name: Paula McCoy
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: May 5
Likes: Meat dishes
Dislikes: Haru's friendliness, vegetables, studying, vaccination shots
Paula is an assassin for the Beehive gang who has trained in America; her alias is "White Fang." She is a colleague of Tsugumi, whom she considers her rival as she has finished second to her in many missions. She is upset that Tsugumi has gotten soft after going to Japan.
(Source: Nisekoi Wikia)

name: Ruri Miyamoto
about:
Age: 16
Height: 140
Birthday: December 24
Ruri is Kosaki's best friend, and is one of the few people who knew about her feelings for Raku. She constantly tries to help Kosaki admit her feelings for Raku often giving her a push from behind to take the next step forward.

name: Nanako Onodera
about: Kosaki's mother.

name: Haru Onodera
about:
Birthday: March 21
Blood Type: A
Height: 152 cm
Kosaki's sister who is a school year younger. On her way to school, she is saved from some delinquents by a mysterious prince (actually Raku Ichijou) and ends up with his locket. Her first impression of Raku is negative as she observes that he is a womanizer who is trying to trick her sister and he is a pervert for looking at her panties. She also refuses to return his locket until Raku convinces her that he is helping the "prince." Unlike her sister, she is a good cook. She later reveals that she was helped by a guy in a mascot costume (also Raku) who treats her to ice cream.

name: Marika Tachibana
about:
Age: 17
Blood type: O
Birthday: March 3
Height: 152 cm
Weight: 41 kg
Hometown: Kyushu, Japan
Marika transfers to Raku's class and is introduced as his fiancée; she bears a key that she thinks will unlock Raku's pendant, and is the most vocal about expressing her love to Raku. She is the daughter of the police chief, and has been in love with Raku for the past ten years. She does not get along with Chitoge; she states she hates girls with long hair despite the fact that she also has long hair. She has a frail constitution; ten years prior, she was frequently visited by a young Raku, who brought her gifts and sparked a friendship with her. She used to speak in a rather vulgar manner but has attempted to correct her language after Raku had told her that he likes girly girls with long hair. However, when flustered, she reverts to her old speaking habits.

name: Seishirou Tsugumi
about:
Age: 15-17
Birthday: July 30
Blood Type: AB
Height: 162 cm
Tsugumi is a hitwoman who was raised and trained by Claude of the Beehive Gangsters.Tsugumi is originally introduced as a guy who transfers to Chitoge's class, and has orders to protect her from Raku, whom she thinks forced Chitoge into the relationship. She and Chitoge are childhood friends; she tries to keep a ten year old promise of becoming strong to protect Chitoge. However, after Raku treats her nicely, she begins to develop some feelings for him, even though she is too stubborn and embarrassed to admit it. In America, her assassin code name is "Black Tiger," who had a rivalry with "White Fang." She does well academically, having ranked next to Chitoge on a yearly exam.

about:

Jibril is the youngest and strongest of the Flügel race. Her love toward knowledge started even before the declaration of the Ten Oaths. She is against the book sharing law created by the Council of Eighteen Wings and left Avant Heim, her homeland, to win the National Library of Elchea from the previous king in a game. When Sora heard what happened to the library, he challenged Jibril in order to gain knowledge of the other kingdoms. When she lost the game, she became Sora and Shiro's servant since she had bet everything she owned, including herself, claiming that knowledge was worth her own life. However, she was allowed to keep the library and maintain it although she now must share it with the rest of Imanity. Jibril thus took the siblings as her masters and over time she began to understand and accept Sora's belief in the potential of humans.
According to Azriel, Jibril was given the gift of imperfection by Artosh. This gift is what Artosh believed would allow Jibril to find the answer to the Flügels' continued existence should he disappear (which was, in fact, the case).

about: The Holy Saint Cecilia is a model of modesty and good morals. She will humbly listen to the sorrows of each parishioner who comes to her for advice and try to help solve the problem or guide them on the right path.

name: Hazelita Aldridge
about:

Abel called her 'Miss'. At first, she was awkward with Cecilia, but now they are good friends.
Based on past events, she hopes the presence of the 'Holy Person' is happy, and does not forgive anyone who tries to take advantage of it.
At first, she also suspected Lawrence, but the misunderstanding was soon resolved, and she spent her days worrying about the frustrating distance between her and Cecilia.

name: Mikuru Asahina
about:
Age: Unknown (17-18 speculated only)
Birthday: October 21
Blood Type: O
Height: 152 cm (5 ft)
Occupation: Student (grade 11-12), SOS Deputy Vice Commander
Mikuru Asahina, a shy and timid girl with a childish naïveté, is the only character other than Kyon to be brought into the SOS Brigade against her will. She is defined by Kyon to be extremely cute, and is often sexually harassed by Haruhi Suzumiya.
Considered one of the most beautiful girls in high school Mikuru is as kind, caring and thoughtful as she is beautiful. She easily gets scared or flustered, and is apparently prone to daydreaming as she can also be rather clumsy at times. Nevertheless, she can be surprisingly resilient and is capable of recovering from even the most discomforting of situations. However, because of her gentle nature she seems rather helpless most of the time. Kyon sees it as his duty to always watch over and protect her, although, when it comes to Haruhi there is no rescue.
Mikuru is the designated "mascot" of the SOS Brigade, serving as a way to attract interest and members by using her attractive physical qualities—her cute face, trim figure, and noticeably sizable bust. She was "voluntarily arrested" by Haruhi, who deemed it necessary to have an alluring lolita type in the club. Her sex appeal and innocence is often exploited by Haruhi to procure resources. Mikuru is on a regular occasion forced to wear any outfits that Haruhi buys for her. Haruhi also sees it fit that Mikuru is unable to dress and undress by herself most times and often does it for her, much to Mikuru's considerable—and vocal—distress. So far, Mikuru has worn the following outfits: maid, waitress, nurse, frog costume, cheerleader, miko, and the infamous bunny-girl.
The name "Mikuru (みくる)" is derived from "Miku" which when written in Kanji is "Mirai (未来)" ("future" in Japanese).

name: Yuki Nagato
about:
Age: 3-4, 16-17 (Physically)
Birthday: November 18
Blood Type: A
Height: 154 cm (5' 0.5")
Occupation: Student (grade 11) 
Yuki Nagato is a quiet high school freshman that is the only member of the SOS Brigade that was not "voluntarily arrested," or coerced into joining, by Haruhi Suzumiya. When Haruhi claimed the empty Literature Club as the SOS Brigade's clubroom, Yuki was found reading there. Haruhi claimed the clubroom and Yuki as part of the Brigade, both of which she didn't mind. She lives alone in the same apartment complex as Ryoko Asakura. She wears glasses and her school uniform at all times, only discarding the former after Kyon babbled that she was cuter without them and that he wasn't a "glasses man," and the latter when the SOS Brigade went on vacation.

name: Haruhi Suzumiya
about:
Age:15-17
Birthday: October 8
Height: 158 cm (5'2")
Blood type: AB
Occupation: Student (grade 10-11), Ultra Director, Ultra Detective, Brigade Chief and Founder
Background
Haruhi Suzumiya, a first year student at North High School (in novels 1-8), and second year (in the 9th and latest novel), can be characterized as funny, eccentric, and somewhat unpredictable. In the series, she is introduced declaring her interests in aliens, espers and time travelers and does not care for "ordinary" human beings. The last thing on her mind is a normal high school life. With a burning desire to find such phenomena in the world, she is generally unapproachable and finds ordinary people boring and uninteresting. As a result of this, many of her classmates choose to avoid and confront her. She deals with her emotions by creating a parallel universe, where she inadvertently releases transparent creatures who tear up and destroy everything that comes into contact with them. Espers are the ones who can stop these creatures by cutting and destroying them, because if these creatures are left alone destroying everything as well as the outer barrier it could affect the outside world. She also likes to dress up Mikuru in random outfits.
Kyon is the first character to engage with her in a serious conversation. From this encounter, she gradually begins to soften up to others and starts to open up with her classmates. Later on, Haruhi took Kyon against his will and forced him to help her start the SOS Brigade, thus she has taken an unknown interests to Kyon later in the series. It is hinted that one of the reasons as to why Haruhi opened up to Kyon was that he resembled John Smith; John Smith and Kyon are the same person.
She is noted as smart, athletic, and naturally talented in any extra-curricular activities. She once joined every activity club in her school and quit because she found them boring, despite pleas by the club members for her membership. Her musical talent was highlighted when she stood in as the emergency lead singer and guitarist, along with Yuki, for the band ENOZ during the school festival.
Personality
At first, Haruhi seems very indifferent and cold but underneath that front she is very spontaneous, upbeat, and hyperactive. Her determination, persistence, and resourcefulness drive her endeavors of finding strange phenomenon and promoting the SOS Brigade. Because of her dedication, she becomes hot-headed when things don't go her way. Hand-in-hand with her cleverness and creativity, and a certain ruthlessness, even seeming amorality, she can often get what she wants, an example of such is when she blackmailed the Computer Society President into giving her a brand new computer for the SOS Brigade. Haruhi tends to pursue her goals regardless of who gets in the way, or is hurt, such as Mikuru in the aforementioned blackmail. She also has a tendency to be jealous and angry when Kyon gets too friendly with any girl. Evidently, the universe was almost destroyed and recreated when Haruhi's jealousy was pushed too far.
Haruhi also has a very competitive personality and accepts without hesitation any challenge that crosses her, regardless of difficulty or time constraint. Her constant optimism and over-confidence make her seem arrogant. She has very high standards and won't accept anything less than perfection from herself and her Brigade. She places a lot of trust in her Brigade members, especially Kyon, to get the task done whatever it may be. This can sometimes make her seem selfish and unkind.
She is not shy and often attracts a lot of attention to the point of not minding changing clothes in front of various people, more so when her SOS Brigade is in mind. When it comes to Mikuru she is very physically playful. She often comments on Mikuru's attractiveness and seems to find a kind of enjoyment in exploiting it to her own ends, often through forcing Mikuru into and out of various costumes such as a bunny girl costume as if she were a human dress-up doll.
SOS Brigade role
Haruhi is the founder and "Brigade Chief" of the SOS Brigade, or Saving The World by Overloading it with Fun Haruhi Suzumiya Brigade. She was unable to find any existing club suitable to her preferences. She made the group in order to find and have fun with aliens, espers, and time travelers. Upon creation, she names herself as its leader. Her method of finding and recruiting members is to "voluntarily arrest" them then force them to join.
The SOS Brigade is very precious to her and has stated to Kyon that she has no intention of yielding her position as Chief to anyone else. She will go to any lengths, even by exploiting the members, to bring attention and support for her Brigade such as procuring room and materials, maintaining their website, participating in sports tournaments, organizing activities such as city-wide searches for strange phenomenon among other things. She wrote, produced, and directed the Brigade's amateur-movie The Adventures of Mikuru Asahina for the school festival.

name: Ryouko Asakura
about:
At first, Ryouko appears to be a compassionate and hard-working high school girl. One of Kyon's friends, Taniguchi, places her in the top three first-year girls in the school with a grade of AA+: indicative of her pleasant personality, beauty, and athleticism. Her enormous popularity made her the unanimous choice for class president of Kyon's homeroom class. She also showed particular concern about how Haruhi had distanced herself from the rest of the class.
A small or "chibi" version of Ryouko Asakura called Achakura-san is present in the Suzumiya Haruhi-chan no Yuuutsu 4-komas.
In her form, she is sometimes chased by cats and would eat her, that is why Yuki took her in. At first, Achakura refused but later adapted to Yuki and became a maid-like chibi person working in Yuki's home.
She is sometimes tortured and frightened by Yuki.

name: Emiri Kimidori
about: A soft-spoken, well-groomed second-year student with long, light green hair, Emiri first appears in "Mysterique Sign" seeking counsel from the SOS Brigade claiming she is the girlfriend of the Computer Research Society president,

name: Kyon's Sister
about:
Not much is revealed about Kyon's fifth-grade sister; not even her real name is given. Other characters simply refer to the eleven-year-old as Kyon's (Younger) Sister or Little Sis. She has relatively few speaking lines, though she does appear in The Adventures of Mikuru Asahina - Episode 00, Episode 6, and Episode 14, fulfilling the duties of an irrepressible younger sister. She has even fewer lines and appearances in the original novel version than the anime's rendition. Usually, her presence is made apparent whenever Kyon is at home.
She is carefree, happy and playful and is also the force behind the use of the nickname "Kyon"; after she heard their aunt call her older brother such, she started using the nickname as well in front of his school friends. From there, the name spread and eventually stuck. She seems to get along well with all of the SOS Brigade, especially with Mikuru, sharing a sister-like relationship with her. 
(Source: Wikipedia)

about: Bass Player for the Band Enoz featured in episode 12 of the Melancholy of Haruhi Suzumiya

name: Fran
about:
Fran is a black cat beastkin that embarked on a journey with her parents in order to search for a way to evolve. However her parents eventually passed away and she got enslaved as a result.
Due to various circumstances, she crossed paths with the sentient sword and they both freed each other. Since the enslaving process robbed her of her name, the sword bestowed unto her the name "Fran," as that was how her parents called her. In return, Fran named the sword Shishio/Master, since he saved and taught her many things. She also gains a darkness wolf familiar named Urushi.
She loves curry.

name: Amanda
about:
Known across the continent as Amanda of Hariti, she is an extremely famous and powerful A-ranked Adventurer of Altessa and a whip user. Often wild and unpredictable while exaggerating her emotions, she tends to be laid back and cheerful.
A guardian of children, Amanda has several orphanages under her protection. She had raised two orphaned Black Catkin children who grew up to become adventurers themselves and had a child together.

name: Nell
about:
Nell is a receptionist of Alessa's Adventurer's Guild.
Generally a nice lady, but curses out people who annoy her to die in her thoughts. Serious about her job.
(Source: Reincarnated as a Sword Wiki)

name: Lala Satalin Deviluke
about:
Birthday: July 7
Age: 16
Height: 165cm
Weight: 50.5kg
Size: 89 - 57 - 87
Zodiac sign: Cancer
Princess of Deviluke. Ran away from home so she doesn't have to get married. Uses many self-made inventions. At first she was pretending to love Rito to keep from getting married, but eventually she fell in love with him. She has physical abilities far beyond that of a human and also has a distinctive tail coming from her back (which is very sensitive).
Being an alien, Lala has far more strength, power and speed than the average human. Her physical strength (without any inventions or powers) surpasses any human on Earth, and maybe even some aliens in the solar system. She has also shown slight durability even with her own tongue, like when she ate one of Run's really spicy sandwiches and it didn't even phase her.
She can fire laser beams from her tail. However, her tail is both her weapon and her weakness. On Planet Deviluke, females' tails are far more sensitive than males'. When someone touches Lala's tail, she becomes weak and seems to lose her strength, though she can shake anyone off of her tail with her astonishing strength.
Perhaps Lala's most distinguishing ability is being an extraordinary inventor. She is considered a genius and has made many inventions; however, Lala very much has the personality of both a perky child and an absent-minded scientist, resulting in all of her inventions being very toy-like, troublesome, and serving no important purpose besides fun, mischief, and unintentional fanservice. A running gag in the plot is that her inventions usually do not work as well as Lala and the others had hoped, often resulting into a perverted accident.
(Source: To LOVE-Ru Wikia)

name: Haruna Sairenji
about:
Birthday: March 6
Height: 160 cm
Weight: 50 kg
3-sizes: 79-56-82 cm
Haruna Sairenji is the second female protagonist of To Love Ru and one of Rito's classmates and the girl of his affections. Haruna has similar feelings for him, having been attracted to his kind, gentle nature since junior high. Despite her growing love for Rito, which she believes to be unrequited, she usually suppresses her feelings and cannot confess to him because of her friendship with Lala who also loves Rito. However, with some encouragement, she tells Lala of her ordeal, to which Lala accepts, claiming Haruna as her rival for Rito's heart, while remaining friends. She lives with her older sister Akiho Sairenji in an apartment and has a severe fear of ghosts and the supernatural, the exception being Oshizu Murasame but only to an extent.
When frightened, she has a habit of grabbing the nearest thing around her – typically Rito – and swinging him wildly, in an attempt to get rid of whatever frightens her. There is also a running gag to where Rito is about to confess to her, only for something (or someone) to come between it. She lives with her older sister in an apartment.
A highly responsible person, Haruna's personality can sway her classmates' hearts to vote for her as their class representative, even when she did not run to be a candidate. She is affiliated with the tennis club and a southpaw. 
(Source: To LOVE-Ru Wikia)

name: Run Elsie Jewelria
about:

Weight: 49 kg
BWH: 83-56-83 cm
A childhood friend of Lala, infamously known for wearing girl clothing during his play dates with Lala. At first he arrives on Earth to win back Lala, but soon becomes jealous due to her relationship with Rito. As Ren is from Planet Memorze, he can change gender in both mind and body upon sneezing; as a girl she goes by the name Run. Run likes Rito, while Ren is in competition (albeit rather one sided) with Rito for Lala's hand in marriage.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Kyouko Kirisaki
about:
Age: 17
Birthday: August 25 
Height: 162 cm
Weight: 49.5 kg
3-sizes: 85/56/85 cm
A half-Earthling half-alien girl, Kyouko is a famous idol who the ability to create and throw fire at will and becomes a friend to Run when Run portrays an antagonist on her show. She is best known for her role as Magical Kyouko, a fictional magical girl character who stars in her own television serial Lala loves watching, often forcing Rito to watch it with her. She reappears again as Run askes Rito to be her date, however Kyouko is able to tell they aren't dating though wishes her luck on getting him. Ever since their first meeting on her show Run and her have done many projects together, one of which is debuting many songs together.
When Rito and his friends are subsequently given invitations to an RPG world Lala had partially created, an image of Kyouko is programmed into the game. However, Kyouko's programming within the game is modified by Nana and Momo, turning her into the "Demon King", tasked to seek out Rito and offer him a way to send him and his friends home if he left Lala and promises to be her boyfriend. Adding to Rito's anxiety, Demon King Kyouko threatens to destroy Rito and his friends if he does not state his feelings for Lala. In comedic fashion, the otherwise unbeatable Kyouko is destroyed by a watering can only Rito can use.
Like some To Love-Ru characters, Kyouko is a homage to Kyouko Kirisaki of Black Cat. Both characters also share the same voice actress in their respective drama CD/animated counterparts, even addressing herself as her Black Cat incarnation, along with fire manipulation. They both have same age, but their heights, weights, birthdays and bloodtypes are different.

name: Konjiki no Yami
about:
Birthday: December 24
Height: 153 cm
Weight: 45 kg
BWH: 75-52-77 cm
Likes: Taiyaki
Dislikes: Perverts
English name: Golden Darkness
A dispassionate, withdrawn assassin, Golden Darkness is hired by one of Lala's arranged suitors, Lacospo to kill Rito, until she breaks the contract, noting the true nature behind her target. Golden Darkness is currently staying on Earth, roaming around the city streets and Sainan High, with a motivation to continue her duty to assassinate Rito, although she has yet to accomplish this (hinting she only said this as an excuse to stay on Earth, which is then confirmed). Commonly referred as "Yami-chan", she spends her time reading books and magazines, while eating taiyaki (it was the only thing she ate on Earth since it was the first food offered by Rito, prior to spending a night at the Yuuki residence for a sukiyaki dinner). By her planet's calculations, she is 24 thousand years-old (as shown in season 1 where the job applicant stops Konjiki no Yami just before she was about to say 'thousand'), despite having the appearance of an 11-year-old (albeit a rather mature one), although this is only mentioned in the anime and has a weakness towards anything slimy.
Like Lala, Golden Darkness' physical abilities are exponentially stronger than a human's. She carries a unique ability to turn her body parts into various objects through use of nano machines circulating her body, ranging from swords to dragon heads. Unfortunately, excessive use becomes a hazard to her health. She states she hates "ecchi" people, and does not hesitate to assault a person who looks at her in an obscene way, even if it's her own fault like when she was using her abilities to increase her bust she attacks Rito when he saw her, mostly out of embarrassment or for many occasions standing at the top of something such as stairs where her panties could be seen by accident. She has also stated, that she doesn't understand if she can feel love and all its wonders, though she slowly becomes closer to Rito once seeing that he is a good person.

name: Yui Kotegawa
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: May 3
Height: 162 cm
Weight: 51 kg
BWH: 88-59-87 cm
Yui is a girl in Rito's class who seems more strict than the others and seems initially uptight about school morals. This attitude can be traced back to her childhood, given that the boys in her class would sexually harass her classmates by flipping their skirts, and picking on her friends. Yui took it upon herself to stand up for her classmates and came to detest boys and shamelessness as a result.
She quickly comes at odds with Lala and her free-spirited personality, which she sees as a hindrance towards making the school a more peaceful and better place. Likewise, she has a certain distaste for Rito, given that his frequent mishaps lead to misunderstandings concerning his true nature. At first, she believes him to be just another shameless pervert, but gradually she begins understanding this is not the case.
Eventually, she loosens up a bit, but she's generally more on her guard than the other girls. She becomes a part of Rito's harem all the same.
In the anime version it is also implied (albeit rather briefly) that she might have feelings for Rito. In the original manga version, however, this is made evident, to the point she even fantasizes about marrying Rito and adopting Celine as her own child. This also causes her attitude to shift, especially in the latter half of the manga, where she mellows out a lot, especially around Rito.
It should be noted that there is a huge rift in terms of how her personality is portrayed between the anime and the manga, especially in the first season where Yui is depicted as far stricter and harsher than she really is. Her introduction episode in the anime makes a very radical departure to her portrayal in the manga, depicting her as extremely puritanical and authoritarian. This is eventually toned down but this initial portrayal has also caused such a reputation to stick among anime-only viewers. 
Likewise, a good deal of her scenes from the manga concerning her character development have either remained unadapted or given to Haruna instead. For example, in the OVAs it's Rito and Haruna who travel together to the fantasy RPG crafted by Lala's sisters, however, in the source material this role was originally given to Yui. It is uncertain why the directors chose to diminish her role in the series, given her popularity among the fanbase. 
In the post-manga interview the authors Saki Hasemi and Kentaro Yabuki declared she was introduced as the only character meant to develop, in contrast to the rest of the cast which were written to sort of "reset" with each chapter, given the slice-of-life setting. This changed in To Love Ru Darkness, which was more story-driven, were most characters are given some sort of development.

The ghost of a girl who died in the old abandoned school building 400 years ago, Shizu is sincere, kind, and very curious about the modern world, but has a severe fear of dogs, likened to Haruna's level of fear to the supernatural. She is usually addressed as "Oshizu" (お静?); the O (お?) is an honorific used to refer to women. When frightened, she can emit blasts of mental stress, blowing apart various objects and surroundings, but is also capable of manipulating others through sheer willpower. A related gag is the blasts of stress frequently rip apart clothing, resulting in Rito being in an awkward situation with one of the female cast. Since her meeting with Rito and the others, she begins exploring the world outside the old school building. Oshizu is aware of Haruna's crush on Rito by her ability to sense feelings while possessing another person and becomes very supportive towards cheering Haruna into confessing her feelings to him.
Oshizu "returns" to the living, after Ryouko creates a prosthetic body for her to inhabit, built with biological qualities (looking and feeling like an actual, human body). However, she occasionally "disconnects" during brief moments of excitement, her spirit leaving her prosthetic body. She currently works as a nurse for Ryouko, while Ryouko maintains Oshizu's physical body. In the first anime, Oshizu is not given a new body and her presence is limited, while she has her body as she does in the manga for the OVA releases and the new anime.
(Source: Wikipedia)

Tsurumaki Kokoro is a happy-go-lucky first-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and the vocalist of Hello, Happy World! Her goal in life is to make the world smile. Despite her appearance, she is extremely wealthy.
She makes a cameo appearance in the eight episode of the first season.
(Source: BanG Dream Wikia)

(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

name: Natsuki Umino

name: Yuri Ushigome

Ushigome Yuri is a third-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and is a member of Glitter*Green. She is the lead vocalist of Glitter*Green, and the older sister of Ushigome Rimi. She and the other members of Glitter*Green are members of the Hanasakigawa Girls' High School student council.
(Source: BanG Dream! Wikia)

name: Rii Uzawa
about:
Uzawa Rii is a third-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and is a member of Glitter*Green. She is the bassist for Glitter*Green, and a salesperson at Edogawa Gakki. She and the other members of Glitter*Green are members of the Hanasakigawa Girls' High School student council.
Rii is a calm girl who usually keeps a check over Hinako and tries to make sure she doesn't get into trouble or ruin their bands "image". Despite that, she has a plush demon, Debeko, she occasionally uses as a puppet.
(Source: BanG Dream! Wikia)

name: Eve Wakamiya
about:
Year: First Year
Birthday: June 27
Zodiac sign: Cancer
Likes: Ginger cookies
Dislikes: Nukazuke
Wakamiya Eve is a third-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and the keytarist for Pastel*Palettes. She is also the current club president for all of her clubs (Flower Arrangement, Kendo & Tea Ceremony). Before joining Pastel*Palettes, she was a model at the same agency, and had some skill in playing the piano.
Eve is half-Japanese and half-Finnish, with her father being Japanese, and her mother Finnish. She comes from Finland and finds Japanese culture exciting, often citing bushido, the code of Japanese warriors.
Outside of the band, she is friends with Tsugumi and also works part-time at her family's cafe as a waitress (Hazawa Coffee). She is also classmates with Tae and Rimi (present).
(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

name: Nanana Wanibe
about:
Wanibe Nanana is a third-year student at Hanasakigawa Girls' High School and is a member of Glitter*Green. She is the keyboardist for Glitter*Green. She and the other members of Glitter*Green are members of the Hanasakigawa Girls' High School student council, with her in the position of student council president.
(Source: BanG Dream! Wikia)

name: Rokka Asahi
about:
School: Haneoka Girls' High School
Year: 1st Year
Class: 1-A
Gender: Female
Height: 155 cm
Band: RAISE A SUILEN

Asahi Rokka is a first year high-school student at Haneoka Girls' High School. She goes by the moniker LOCK as the guitarist for the band RAISE A SUILEN.
She is in the same class as Asuka and Ako, and studies at Haneoka instead of Hanasakigawa due to a scholarship program.
Rokka is a slender girl of average height. She has sharp leafy green eyes and blue hair with her fringe splitting into three sections and her bangs reach her chins. The rest of her hair is resting on a shoulder-laying with a thick scrunchy with star ornaments.
She wears black glasses and wears a frilly dress with a bow behind with green socks and two strap flat brown shoes. Her necklace carries a key to her house.
When she performs, she takes both her glasses and scrunchy off.

about:

Likes; Her mother's cakes
Dislikes: Black coffee
Hazawa Tsugumi is a third-year student at Haneoka Girls' High School and the keyboardist of Afterglow. She is often called "Tsugu" by her friends. She likes collecting bath powder. Outside of the band, she is also friends with Wakamiya Eve and Futaba Tsukushi, who she works with at her family cafe.
(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

She made cameo appearance in the third episode of the first season of anime.

She sometimes helps out at her parents' meat shop. Her favorite activity is running marathons. Outside of the band, she is friends with Yamabuki Saaya.

She's friends with the adults who work in the shopping district, and often attends her hometown's festivals to play the taiko drum. Outside of the band, she is also friends with Yamabuki Saaya. She is interested in fashion and taiko drumming.

(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

name: Reona Nyubara
about:
Nyubara Reona is a second-year middle school student at Kamogawa Chuou Middle School. She goes by the moniker PAREO and is the keyboardist for the band RAISE A SUILEN.
She adores CHU² and has said she admires her deeply. She calls her CHU²-sama and sometimes Goshujinsama (lit. Master).

about:

Year: 2nd Year
Gender: Female
Height: 170 cm
Band: Raise A Suilen

Satou Masuki is a second-year high school student at Shirayuki Private Academy, which is a catholic all-girls' school with branches for both middle and high school.
She goes by the moniker MASKING (マスキング) and is the drummer for the band RAISE A SUILEN. Her longing to become such a drummer like her father - who is the owner of Galaxy Live House - made her start playing the drums.

name: Chiyu Tamade
about:
Tamade Chiyu is a returnee who attends Celosia Girls' Academy, which is an international school. She is 14 years old but due to her excellent grades, she is a first-year high school student.
She goes by the stage name CHU² (チュチュ) (read as CHUCHU) and is the leader, producer and DJ for the band RAISE A SUILEN. She uses DTM (Desktop Music) to compose music.
Similarly to Kokoro, she is very rich and lives in a penthouse, where the band also practices at.
(Source: Wikipedia, Bandori Wiki)

name: Rei Wakana
about:
School: Geijutsu Academy's Musical Department
Year: Third Year
Gender: Female
Height: 172 cm
Band: Raise A Suilen

Wakana Rei is a third-year high school student at Geijutsu Academy's Musical Department. She goes by the moniker LAYER (レイヤ) and is the lead singer and bassist for the band RAISE A SUILEN. She is Tae's childhood friend and Nyamu's next door neighbour.

name: Uika Misumi
about: Uika is the vocalist and the guitarist of sumimi, an electro pop duet idol group. She loves stargazing, and often visits planetariums during her free time.

name: Sakiko Togawa
about: A first-year student in Haneoka. Sakiko is refined girl who comes from a rich family, and used to attend Tsukinomori Girls' Academy. She often plays the piano in the school's music room.

name: Mutsumi Wakaba
about: Mutsumi Wakaba is a first-year high school student. She is very stoic and a taciturn. Her father is a famous comedian called Wakaba, and her mother is Mori Minami, an actress. One of her hobbies is ballet.

name: Umiri Yahata
about: Umiri is a first-year student at Hanasakigawa. She is an exceptionally proficient bassist who has played as a support artist for over 30 different bands.

name: Nyamu Yuutenji
about:
Nyamu is an up-and-coming beauty influencer who goes under the name "Nyamuchi". She mainly posts videos about makeup on her channel and is always looking for ways to  become known.
(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

Food dislikes: Pickled plums, Sour food
Band: MyGO!!!!!

Chihaya Anon is one of the guitarists of the band MyGO!!!!! She also handles both the band's costumes which she calls "ANON TOKYO" brand clothes and social media.
(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

name: Tsukushi Futaba
about:
Futaba Tsukushi is a first-year student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and the leader and drummer of Morfonica.
A class president who's always full of confidence. Though she tries her best, her clumsiness comes out now and then. She works tirelessly to become a reliable, trustworthy person.

name: Nanami Hiromachi
about: A somewhat peculiar girl who longs to be normal, and constantly wonders whether the things she does or says are normal. She worries about standing out and hides her true self in order to blend in. Though she hides it, she gets excellent grades, has great artistic skills and is a bit of a genius, and tends to brush her achievements off with phrases like "it was just a coincidence" or "this is nothing special". Adding to her genius nature, she is able to do things just with a bit of research on the internet, such as arranging songs or making the accessories for their outfits.

name: Raana Kaname
about:
School: Hanasakigawa Girls' Junior High School
Year: Third Year
Birthday: February 22
Zodiac Sign: Pisces
Hobbies: Playing with cats
Food likes: Matcha, Soba, Yubeshi
Food dislikes: Garlic chives, Grated yam, Mint-flavored foods, Onions

Kaname Raana is one of the guitarists of the band MyGO!!!!!
(Source: BanG Dream Wiki)

name: Touko Kirigaya
about:
Kirigaya Touko is a first-year student at Tsukinomori Girls' Academy, and the lead guitarist of Morfonica. She handles the band's costumes and like Lisa, follows gyaru fashion. 
Touko is a popular girl who gathers people around her both at school and on social media, where she goes by the name TOKO and is known as a popular influencer who's able to find and create the latest trends. She is a cheerful and open-hearted girl, but those around her are often caught up by her tendency to play things by ear. She often talks in gyaru slang and wants to take selfies no matter where she goes (even during performances).

name: Mashiro Kurata
about:
Mashiro is a quiet, shy and reserved girl. Though she aspired for Tsukinomori Girls' Academy and managed to get in, she was overwhelmed by the talented individuals around her. As a result, she felt depressed daily until she stumbled upon Poppin'Party's performance in CiRCLE.
She's full of imagination and tends to get lost in her fantasies. Mashiro tends to think negatively quite often, and is afraid of interacting with strangers because she thinks she might give them a bad first impression of herself, as well as make them think she's strange.
She also likes Michelle and all kinds of other fluffy characters.
