name: Rui Yashio
about:
Rui is a talented violinist who has played the violin ever since she was young. However, at some point in her life, she lost in a competition against Rinko Shirokane, came to the conclusion that she has no true talent and as a result, quit playing the violin.
Rui is also a member of Tsukinomori Girls' Academy's student council. She initially tagged to Morfonica's band practices only because they needed someone from the student council to monitor their activities.

name: Nonomi Izayoi
about:
A member of the task force of the Countermeasure Committee at Abydos High.
She has an emotional and gentle personality, and serves as a mental support for the Committee, many of whom have extreme personalities. Although she hasn't said it herself, she is the daughter of a very rich family, and most of the snacks for the Council come out from her allowance.

name: Serika Kuromi
about:
"N-No, not at all....
It's not like I'm doing it for Sensei's sake."
Kuromi Serika is one of the students studying in Abydos High School who wields an Assault Rifle.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Ayane Okusora
about:
A serious treasurer of Abydos' Countermeasures Committee. The type of girl who values principles and rules, she's doing her earnest to restore Abydos High.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Shiroko Sunaookami
about:
"The more prepared you are, the better. It's a simple rule." -Sunaookami Shiroko
Sunaookami Shiroko is one of the students studying in Abydos High School who wields an Assault Rifle.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Hoshino Takanashi
about:
Takanashi Hoshino is one of the students studying in Abydos High School who wields a Shotgun.
She is the chairwoman of the Countermeasures Committee, also known as Foreclosure Task Force.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Hifumi Ajitani
about:
A sensitive girl, Hifumi is a student of Trinity Integrated Academy and a member of the Supplementary Classes Club.
Despite her average grades and appearance, Hifumi's gentle and kind personality has gained her popularity.
While she will gladly lend an ear to those with problems, she has a tendency to be swept up in the moment and unintentionally cause trouble.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Ako Amau
about:
Ako is one of the students studying in Gehenna Academy who wields a Handgun.
She is a member of the Disciplinary Committee.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Arona
about: Arona is a self-proclaimed high-performance AI who serves as the OS of the Shittim Chest. She resides in a desolate classroom located in the midst of a watery expanse, stretching further than the eye can see.

name: Mutsuki Asagi
about:
Age: 16
Birthday: July 29
Height: 144 cm
Club: Problem Solver 68
Hobby: Bomb collection
Asagi Mutsuki is one of the second-year students studying at Gehenna Academy who wields a Machine Gun.
She is a member of Problem Solver 68.
(Source: Sensei! Welcome to Kivotos! Wiki)

name: Hasumi Hanekawa
about:
The No. 2 on Trinity's Justice Realization Committee. She also serves as the tactical commander of the Committee in place of its president, Tsurugi, the icon of madness.
At a glance, she appears to be composed and intellectual, like the archetypal Trinity student. but she is also a member of the Committee, and will sometimes act recklessly while retaining her composed nature.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)
No voice actors have been added to this character. Help improve our database by searching for a voice actor, and adding this character to their roles .

name: Yuuka Hayase
about:
Academy: Millennium Science School
Year: 2nd Year
Birthday: March 14th
Height: 5'1"
Enrolled in the Millennium Science School, Yuuka is the treasurer of the student council known as "Seminar".
A prominent mathematical genius even amongst Millennium's STEM-rich student base, she supervises the management of the school's budget.
Yuuka's speciality is the abacus, and she has a habit of counting on one in order to compose herself when faced with complex and troubling matters.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Haruka Igusa
about:
An "entry-level employee" of Problem Solver 68 and 1st year student at Gehenna Academy. Despite being shy and possessing cripplingly low self-esteem, her ideas and determination to commit any act makes her the scariest and most dangerous amongst the already erratic fixers.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Nagisa Kirifuji
about:
Affiliated with Trinity General Academy, she is the leader of "Filius", one of the student union bodies that make up Trinity, and the host of the "Tea Party" student council.
Nagisa is refined and soft-spoken, but rarely reveals her true feelings, making her a complicated and mysterious character. Her hobby is preparing tea leaves and sweets for tea parties. She dreams of a day when many Trinity students would be invited to a tea party of hers.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Rin Nanagami
about:
Nanagami Rin is the Chief Administrative Officer and the Vice President of the General Student Council, and the acting leader of Kivotos.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Kayoko Onikata
about:
The "Section chief" of Problem Solver 68 and a 3rd year student at Gehenna Academy.
Unlike the other fixers, Kayoko is not one with ill intentions. However, she is often misunderstood as a delinquent simply due to natural scary facial expressions and appearance. She normally prefers to keep silent about this topic, as it likely leads to furthering her terrifying image.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Aru Rikuhachima
about:
Gehenna Academy's self-appointed president of Handyman 68, conducts all sorts of illegal business as she pleases.
While Aru considers herself to be a cool outlaw, she often falls out of character and thus any appearance disparities are easily revealed.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Iori Shiromi
about:
Iori Shiromi is one of the students studying at Gehenna Academy, who wields a Sniper Rifle. She is a member of the Disciplinary Committee.
A 2nd year student and a cold-blooded specialist of the feared Prefect Team. As the field captain of its assault corps, she immediately punishes students who violate the rules with overwhelming force whenever and wherever she finds them.
While she may be efficient and formidable in combat, she is also reckless and stubborn, and is prone to losing sight of her surroundings once she spots an enemy, which makes it easy for her to fall for even obvious traps.
Strict with the rules, Iori will punish any and all rule-breakers. Although she's skilled in combat, she tends to be blind of her surroundings when engaging a target. She is also quite exhausted due to having to deal with troublemakers despite the holidays.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Hina Sorasaki
about:
Age: 17
Birthday: February 19
Height: 142 cm
School year: third year
Club: disciplinary committee
Hobby: sleeping, taking a break
Hina Sorasaki is a 3rd year student and the current chairwoman of Gehenna's Prefect Team, who is rightfully feared by every student in the academy, if not all of Kivotos. She is a troublesome, laid-back person, and calls it a "hassle" when she talks about school rules. However, she's still strict while at the academy, and enacts calm and quick judgment without hesitation on the battlefield. Her fighting prowess is astounding and for that reason, any organization that opposes Gehenna is more afraid of her than anyone else from the Prefect Team.
Although shown to seem rather cold and distant on the outside, Hina is shown to be a very relaxed and soft person when she's allowed to express herself, despite her title as of the head of the Prefect Team. She is always busy with work and considers many of her tasks as bothersome, if not understandably, stressfully exhausting.

name: Noa Ushio
about:
Member of the Millennium Science School, secretary of the "Seminar" student council.
Noa mainly records seminar decisions and meeting minutes, and is also in charge of the patent attorney's duties of identifying and registering patents for products developed by Millennium students. She has a very good memory and can almost perfectly memorize whatever she sees and hears once.
(Source: Blue Archive Wiki)

name: Subaru Awa
about:
Subaru Awa is one of the main characters in Girls Band Cry, an original anime produced by Toei Animation. She assumes the role of the drummer within the band Togenashi Togeari.
Subaru is a girl who attends a performing arts school. She is considered a promising talent and has appeared in commercials. Subaru is a socially adept and charming beauty. She takes pride in her stunning appearance, which could easily be mistaken for that of a model. However, beneath her exterior, she possesses a strong-willed and competitive nature, characteristic of a proud young lady.
(Source: Girls Band Cry Wiki)

name: Tomo Ebizuka
about:
Tomo Ebizuka is one of the main characters in Girls Band Cry, an original anime produced by Toei Animation. She assumes the role of the keyboardist within the band Togenashi Togeari.
Originally hailing from a well-known affluent family in her hometown, Tomo is now living in an apartment through room-sharing. She maintains a cold and aloof attitude towards the world. Much like a hedgehog, she is highly wary and doesn't easily open up to others.
(Source: Girls Band Cry Wiki)

name: Nina Iseri
about:
Nina Iseri is one of the main characters in Girls Band Cry, an original anime produced by Toei Animation. She assumes the role of the vocalist within the band Togenashi Togeari.
Nina is somewhat an introverted and ordinary girl. She has always been inconspicuous throughout elementary, middle, and high school, with average grades. She doesn't have any particular big dreams and has lived her life by reading the atmosphere and adapting to everyone else.
(Source: Girls Band Cry Wiki)

name: Momoka Kawaragi
about:
Momoka Kawaragi is one of the main characters in Girls Band Cry, an original anime produced by Toei Animation. She assumes the role of the guitarist within the band Togenashi Togeari.
A 20-year-old street musician. Momoka has a straightforward and tomboyish personality. She dislikes feminine attire and opts for plain and simple hairstyles and clothing. She has a cheerful and caring nature, exuding the aura of a reliable senior member in a sports team.
(Source: Girls Band Cry Wiki)

name: Rupa
about:
Rupa is one of the main characters in Girls Band Cry, an original anime produced by Toei Animation. She assumes the role of the bassist within the band Togenashi Togeari.
Rupa is a girl with a slightly tanned Oriental vibe, born to a South Asian father and a Japanese mother. She exudes artistic sensibility and possesses sharp intellect. Considered a genius due to her calm way of speaking and modest attitude, she earns the respect of others. However, her flaw lies in being a heavy drinker and having an excessively strong character.
(Source: Girls Band Cry Wiki)

name: Ichihime
about: One of the first characters to appear in the Mahjong soul Shrine. She is the current priestess of the shrine who claims to be human, despite her cat ears. To Ichihime, nothing is more important than eating and napping.

name: Kaguyahime
about:
This girl has rabbit ears and calls herself Kaguyahime. She declares that anyone who touches her ears will be cursed by the Moon. Occasionally, she may quote the famous line "On behalf of the Moon, I shall exterminate you" and makes you wonder whether she is really a goddess or not. While her appearance looks like a cute girl, she enjoys pranking others and lying. After her arrival at the Mahjong Soul Shrine, she started to battle for the ownership of the shrine and the rivalry between her and Ichihime got really intense...
(Source: MahjongSoul Wiki)

name: Yui Yagi
about:
Yagi Yui is a genius with an IQ of 180, but people keep their distance from her because she cannot interpret their emotions. Still, she longs to understand others and to be understood. On a chance visit, she came to the Mahjong Soul Shrine, and she started to change. Other than coffee and snacks, being her favourite beverage and food, Yui really has a poor sense of taste.
(Source: MahjongSoul Wiki)

name: Collette
series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!
about:
Age: 13
Height: 145 cm
Weight: 37 kg
An underclassman, who is also a member of the art club, moved to Japan with her parents due to their careers and has been living there for around seven years. She became so accustomed to living in Japan that she decided to stay there alone even after her parents returned home.
(Source: Kono Bijutsubu Wiki)

name: Mizuki Usami
series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: 24th July
Height: 154 cm
Weight: 48 kg
Usami Mizuki is a devoted second-year student at Tsukumori Middle School, who holds a deep passion for the Art Club, despite being its sole dedicated member. She's a kind-hearted individual with a strong sense of empathy, and is always ready to lend a hand to those in need, regardless of the situation.
Although she is normally easy going and possesses a kind disposition, Mizuki's temper can be quite short and explosive. Whenever she perceives her club mate being perverted or lazy she responds aggressively. This can sometimes result in her using force to resolve a situation, but only when necessary. She is especially despondent towards Subaru's antics and his waste of artistic talent that he uses solely to draw pretty anime girls.
(Source: Kono Bijutsubu Fandom)

name: Kaori Ayase
series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!
about: A second year middle school student and Mizuki's friend.

name: Maria Imari
series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!
about:
Age: 14
Height: 157 cm
Weight: 47 kg
Maria Imari is a second-year student of Tsukumori Middle School. She has a cheerful attitude, and she loves manga and anime.
(Source: Kono Bijutsubu Fandom)

series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!
about: A second year middle school student and Mizuki's friend.

name: Moeka
series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!

name: Yumeko Tachibana
series: Kono Bijutsu-bu ni wa Mondai ga Aru!
about:
The new supervisor of the art club and a teacher at Tsukimori junior high. She's not knowledgeable about art and is clumsy, but tries her best to help.
(Source: Kono Bijutsubu ni wa Mondai ga Aru! Wiki)

name: Fina
about:
Fina is a kind, honest, and hardworking girl. Having been forced to care for her family at a very young age, she is very responsible and mature. 
She has greenish-brown hair, half of which is usually tied at the back with a large pink ribbon. She has kind lime-green eyes and is usually seen smiling.
Fina wears an ankle length tea-green dress with a light brown vest worn over it. Occasionally she also wears a shoulder bag that contains most of her necessary belongings such as daggers and knives for skinning and money.
(Source: Kuma Kuma Kuma Bear Wiki)

name: Yuna
about: Yuna is the protagonist of Kuma Kuma Kuma Bear. She is a shut-in fifteen year old who fanatically played VRMMO World Fantasy Online when she receives a bear costume from the creators of the game and joins a new world.

name: Shia Foschurose
about:
Shia had a very prideful and arrogant personality before meeting . Initially, she believed that she is one of the strongest students at her school and that no girl is stronger than her. But after suffering a devastating defeat at the hands of Yuna, she becomes less conceited.
Shia is the elder sister of  and the daughter of  and . She currently lives with her mother in the Royal Capital and attends the Royal Academy, while her sister and father live together in Crimonia.
Shia wears her blonde hair split into two pig tails, with a strand of hair falling out on both sides. Shia is often seen in a typical school uniform which has a sleeveless navy-greyish jumper worn on top of her white shirt and a black tie. She wears a red and white checkered skirt and thigh length socks. Like her younger sister, Shia has purple eyes and has a paler skin colour.
(Source: Kuma Kuma Kuma Bear Wiki)

name: Lurina
about:
Lurina (Funimation Name: "Rulina") is the other member of Deborane's party. She is the most responsible member of the party and also the only female. Lurina is also much kinder than the other males given that she is a more sensible person. Yuna and Lurina goes to defeat the goblins and ends up fighting the Goblin King as well since Yuna decides to help the party complete their quest.
(Source: Kuma Kuma Kuma Bear Wiki)

name: Shuri
about:
Shuri is the youngest daughter of Tirumina and Roy (deceased). Her older sister Fina often helps take care of her, alongside Gentz who sees the two girls as his own daughters, and takes of her mother while she is ill. 
She loves bears. Especially Yuna.

name: Mirai Kuriyama
about:
Birthday: March 31
Height: 152 cm
Blood type: O
Hair color: light brown/pink
Eye color: brown/gold
Mirai is a first-year high school student with the ability to manipulate blood, an ability that is unique even in the spirit world. This ability causes her to be isolated, leading her to jump off the roof of the high school until she is saved by Akihito.
Clumsy and a bit aloof, Mirai rarely stands out in school. In fact, she struggles pretty much in life; she has to earn her own money to make ends meet, but her constant fear of actually encountering a youmu prevents her from earning an income from slaying youmu, which most spirit world warriors take on as part of their profession. To make things worse, her hobby of writing blog articles about bonsai is often ridiculed on the Internet.
(Source: Wikipedia)

name: Mitsuki Nase
about:
Birthday: November 1
Height: 165 cm
Blood type: AB
A second-year student and the president of Literary Club. She is a Spirit World Warrior who hails from the prestigious Nase family. Her frank way of speaking makes her seem like she has a sadistic personality, although she has expressed compassion a number of times throughout the series.
She is with Akihito in order to observe him, but she is in fact very worried about him. She is on good terms with Akihito and is thus able to speak with him in a very frank manner.

name: Sakura Inami
about:
Birthday: April 29
Height: 159 cm
Blood type: A
A daughter of a family to whom Mirai is indebted to. With a monotonous speech pattern and an almost emotionless face, Sakura is portrayed as a girl transformed by revenge into a single-minded machine bent on killing the one responsible for the death of her sister.
(Source: kyoukai-no-kanata.wikia)

name: Yayoi Kanbara
about: Akihito's human mother.

name: Izumi Nase
about:
Birthday: April 7 
Height: 170 cm
Blood type: O negative 
Izumi is the representive of Nase family, a skilled Spirit World Warrior and the older sister of Hiroomi and Mitsuki. Befitting the face of the Nase family, Izumi exudes an air of elegance, contrasted by her tendency to be frank toward other people while still retaining her kind expression. To other people, she shows an ordinary personality, but she becomes a wicked character when interacting with the second daughter of the family.

about:

Ayaka is a fox Youmu, who works as a Spirit World Warrior. Ayaka is a knowledgeable and mysterious Youmu who always appears calm and level-headed. She has a sense of humor that could almost be called cruel as she did not spare Akihito from showing his mother's embarrassing message to outsiders while casually calling her "big-busted" and "kind of crazy" in one sentence.

A cat Youmu who lives with Ayaka. She usually takes the form of a human, but when she grows too strong, she reverts to the form of a two-tailed Scottish Fold. She helps Ayaka with housework and models for photos, among other things.

name: Maa
about: A cheerful and energetic munchkin. She is very playful and has short orange hair.

name: Rou
about: A level-headed Russian Blue. She appears to have an interest in politics.

name: Shii
about: A singupara who is very shy and sweet. She can also be a bit of a crybaby.

name: Puniru
about:
Puniru is a slime made by Kotaro Kawaii when he was a child and, for unknown reasons, came to life. It claims to be the cutest thing in the world.
Puniru's original form was a blue penguin with a hat, however, as the years passed and Kotaro began to pay less attention to Puniru, it decided to take the form of a cute girl in order to try to gain his attention again and make him call her cute. Her old penguin form is the shape of her side bag, where she keeps the ingredients to make more slime when she needs to transform. Despite her current form, Puniru has no gender.

name: Cocoa Himezawa
about: Kotaro's classmate. A modern girl who wants to be spoiled on social media.

name: Chii Hoshigari
about: Kotaro's classmate. A gyaru girl who admires celebrities.

name: Runru
about: Originally built to make Alice believe her OC Runrune came to life.

name: Ai Hinatsuru
about:
Age: 9
Birthdate: October 7

name: Ginko Sora
about:
Age: 14
Birthdate: September 9, 2002
Ginko is a female shogi player who started moving shogi pieces at the age of 2, became Kiyotaki’s disciple at the age of 4, and has owned two of the six titles attainable by female shogi players since she was 11. 
Her undefeated record against female pros is the source of her nickname, “The Snow White of Naniwa." While Ginko is an accomplished professional shogi player, Ginko’s popularity is on another level compared to Yaichi’s.
(Source: Ryuuou no Oshigoto Wiki)

name: Ai Yashajin
about:

The protagonist. Commonly known as "the Witch of the Highlands." A girl who was reincarnated as an unaging undying witch with the body of a seventeen-year-old. Since she died of overwork in our world, she's especially sensitive to labor conditions.
(Source: Volume 1 character info)

(Source: Volume 1 character information)

(Source: Volume 1 character info)

A high-ranking member of the demon elite known as the Lord of the Flies. She's been alive for three thousand years. Her personality is belligerent, as you'd expect from a demon but she's actually about as good at looking for others as Azusa.
(Source: Volume 1 Character Information)

(Source: Volume 3 Character Information)

(Source: Volume 3 Character Information)

In the anime, however, she's just as kind as she seems, and has no such dark side. She's grouped with Anastasia in the unit Love Laika and appointed as leader of the whole Cinderella Project.

Shy with a gentle heart, Chieri is an easily stressed but hardworking young girl. Starting off feeling unfit to be an idol, Chieri suffers from a case of social anxiety and doesn't want to draw attention to herself. She wanted to change this, her weak-willed self, by becoming an idol. Mustering up all the courage she could, she auditioned to be an idol. She collects four-leaf clovers for luck as a result of a childhood memory. Possessing a warm heart, she always wishes for other people's happiness. Because of her clover collecting hobby, Chieri has come to be strongly associated with four-leaf clovers, and they make a large appearance in many of her official cards. They are also often incorporated into many of her stage and casual outfits. Due to her meek, sweet personality and cards portraying her with angel wings, she has gained the nickname "Archangel Chieriel" (大天使チエリエル) among fans.
(Source: Idolm@ster Wiki)

She is the closest person to being "evil" among the Cinderella Girls characters, although this really means she's just a bit more confrontational than the typical idol. With her boast of "I am the Queen of Evil!", she enjoys watching others getting pranked or laughing at their misfortune. She tends to do things for seemingly no reason other than that she enjoys being spiteful. She carries a megaphone everywhere, and always wears a hateful scowl.

name: Yuka Nakano
about:
Yuka is a karate champion who seeks to expand her horizons by becoming an idol. She was her karate teams’ team captain and was the ranking National Champion. Karate is a major aspect of her life, but she wants to be a master of dance and song as well.
Interestingly, unlike other idols' hobbies, Yuka’s is never visually incorporated into her idol costumes. She's shown to wear a karate gi in her first card illustration (taken before she became an idol), but it's never been shown on stage. Instead, her trademark is her two ponytails, and she gets very embarrassed if she's seen with her hair down.

As an idol, she always dons her sentai wear which usually consists of a feminine style heroic outfit, a set of goggles, a utility belt, and a scarf. While the type of shows she likes are for a male audience, she loves heroic series like Super Sentai and Kamen Rider.
In the tie in Cinderella Girls Theater skits, Hikaru yearns to be a real life hero and believes that her dreams will only be fully realized when she becomes one. When it is revealed that she doesn’t have a planned to say for her transformation sequence, she freaks out and asks Akiha Ikebukuro to redesign her hero suit with this in mind. She has apparently found a friend in Chika Yokoyama.

name: Nagisa Ibuki
about:
A kind girl who wanted to become idol for her friend's sake. She embraces everyone around her with a cheerful smile. Attracted by Kotono's honesty, they became best friends. Wanting to support Kotono, she decided to become an idol.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Rei Ichinose
about:
Rei is a dance-loving high schooler in her third year. She has a strong desire to improve and hates to lose more than most people. Because of her high level of professionalism, her "righteousness" sounds aggressive and intrusive to those around her, and they sometimes clash with her.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Sakura Kawasaki
about:
Birthday: April 3
Sakura is a naive girl who cherishes the ordinary days. She can sense the subtleties of the heart because of her past experiences and is kind enough to be there for others.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Kotono Nagase
about:
Birthday: December 25
Kotono is a lonely idol who fights with great regret. She wasn't the type to have many friends to begin with, but after an incident a few years ago, she began to cut off relations with others she was close with. From then on, she started practicing on her own, concentrating on becoming an idol.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Mana Nagase
about:
Birthday: October 9
Mana is an idol who makes everyone around her smile just by being there. She is one of those rare beings who have a star quality that is out of reach, but at the same time has an unpretentious friendliness. After her debut, she quickly gained popularity and became known as a "starry miracle." She is an idol with excellent singing and performance skills, and she has a remarkable passion for live performances.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Suzu Narumiya
about:
Suzu is a clumsy and easily teased young lady. Although her cocky and high-spirited attitude is noticeable, she doesn't make people feel uncomfortable and is warmly admired by the people around her. She visits Hoshimi Production as an escape from a certain trouble.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Haruko Saeki
about:
At first glance, Haruko appears to be a cool beauty, but on the inside she is a humble late-bloomer idol. She made her solo debut a few years ago, but she is a hard worker who has not yet made her mark. She thinks she doesn't have any talent as an idol, but she keeps pushing forward towards her dream.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Saki Shiraishi
about:
Saki is a smart girl who has lived a serious life with her younger sister, Chisa, in mind. She is a picture-perfect honor student and is also the student body president at school. She took the leap into the world of her dreams for the first time to break free of her honor student lifestyle.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Chisa Shiraishi
about:
Chisa is a timid girl who always seems to be hiding behind her sister, Saki. Because she has been protected by her sister, she has grown up to be an inward-looking child in contrast to her sister. In order to break out of her shell and overcome her own complex, she knocked on the door of the office. She has a good fashion sense and shows her talent by coordinating Saki's personal clothes.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Kokoro Akazaki
about:
Kokoro is the friendly and well-mannered captain of the group LizNoir. Her sometimes harsh mannerisms make it hard to see the bottom of things.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Aoi Igawa
about:
Aoi is the brains of LizNoir, she is always calm, with few emotional ups and downs. She expresses her thoughts in a straightforward manner, but she has a cool attitude. She is the person who understands Rio best. Rio is who Aoi has shared hardships with since before her debut.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Rio Kanzaki
about:
Rio is LizNoir's absolute center with an aggressive style and an insatiable appetite for victory. After a hiatus, she came back to break her ties with a certain person. She aims to stand at the top of the idol industry with the strongest determination.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Ai Komiyama
about:
Ai loves to make people smile and is the mood-maker of LizNoir. She has strong technical skills, but is extremely clumsy at critical moments. She has a hard time getting a joke across and believes too much of what her heart tells her.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Sumire Okuyama
about:
Sumire is a former child prodigy actor who seems too mature to be a junior high school student. She commutes to school from her parents' home in Yamagata Prefecture, but she doesn't mind the difficulties she has endured and she is always smiling. She usually has a middle school-age spirit, but when she is not careful, she has a tendency to speak in a dialect.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Yuu Suzumura
about:
Yu was born in Kyoto, and she is always calm and collected in her group, TRINITYAiLE. Her father is the president of a large corporation and her mother is a famous actress. She is one of the people who are fascinated by Rui Tendo and always puts her first.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Rui Tendou
about:
Rui is a genius idol who excels in all aspects of dance, singing and performance. In reality, however, she is a proven talent backed by overwhelming effort. She never stops moving forward, even when things get tough, in order to be recognised by someone.
(Source: Idoly Pride Wiki)

name: Hikari Wanda
about:
Hikari Wanda is a first-year at Ichirin High School and a member of the school's dance club.
She loves dancing, and although she barely has any muscle, her dance sense is outstanding. Michael Jackson is her main inspiration as a dancer.

name: On Miyao
about:
On Miyao is a third-year at Ichirin High School and the president of the school's dance club.
On has been dancing for ten years. She is a highly skilled dancer and dances to many different styles, including hip-hop, popping, locking, whacking, and more. She is dependable, helps the members of the dance club out, and instructs the club members in place of their inexperienced club advisor. Her inspiration for getting into dancing was Ne-Yo.

name: Kiwi Araga
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: July 6th
Kiwi is a member of the evil organization Enormeeta. She joined because she wanted to beat up the magical girls, who were getting more attention than her on social media. 
She transferred to the same school as Utena and often fantasized about going to a love hotel with her.
(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki)

name: Utena Hiiragi
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: November 14
Favourite Food: Jelly
Least Favorite Food: Spicy Food
Utena is a shy and introverted girl who longingly admires magical girls, collects their memorabilia, and talks about them passionately. At some point, her obsession had reached the point where she wished to fight alongside Tres Magia, but that led to her being tricked into joining Enormeeta by Venalita.
Although reluctant to accept it at first, her true nature is sadistic, and she tends to lack self-restraint when facing magical girls. When she first recognized she wanted to humiliate magical girls, she felt conflicted by her past feelings of admiration. However, after a near defeat at the hands of Magia Sulfur, she now more readily embraces her sadistic side.
She has a magical weapon that takes the form of a riding crop called Frusta Dominazione (Lash of Domination), with it she can strike inanimate objects, animals, and plants to create a Schiavo (Slave), a minion created by magic that can be directly controlled by her.
The word "baiser" in the name for her magical alter ego, "Magia Baiser," has French origins. When used as a noun, it translates to "kiss." When used as a verb, it is a vulgar slang term for sex.
(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki, edited)

name: Korisu Morino
about:
Age: 9
Birthday: February 8th
Korisu is a quiet and reserved girl. She has a large collection of precious old toys, which she can manipulate using her magic. 
(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki)

about:

about:

name: Haruka Hanabishi
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: April 30th
Haruka is one of Utena's classmates and a magical girl. She is kind, pure-hearted, and gullible. She likes nametake and dislikes kinako.
(Source: Mahou Shoujo ni Akogarete Wiki)

name: Akiho Hanabishi
about: Younger sister of Hanabishi Haruka.

name: Korisu's Mother
about: She is Korisu's mother. She often has to leave Korisu alone at home because she's busy with work, but she bought her a doll so Korisu isn't too lonely.

name: Sayo Minakami
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: September 1st
Role: Magical girl and shrine maiden
Sayo was recruited by Haruka as the second member of Tres Magia.

name: Sister Gigant
about: Gigant is a member of Lord's Legion.

name: Michiko Tanaka
about:
Birthday: January 27th
Michiko is the leader of Lord's Legion.

name: Kaoruko Tenkawa
about:
Age: 14
Birthday: August 17th
Kaoruko is a member of Tres Magia, shown to be crude, short-tempered, and yet the most intelligent out of the three magical girls.

name: Saya (VN)
about:
A mysterious girl who appeared before Fuminori, sparking intrigue with her quest to find her missing father. In Fuminori's distorted perception, Saya is the only figure of normalcy and becomes a crucial source of mental support. As time passes, she gradually grows fond of Fuminori, reciprocating his deep affection and care towards her.
[spoiler]True to Fuminori's suspicion, Saya is not a human; she's an eldritch entity whose actual form is perceived as grotesque and horrifying to everyone except Fuminori. 
Her origins are ambiguous and subject to various interpretations throughout the story. The narrative suggests that she is not of this world, either literally or metaphorically. She has no memories of where she came from and is guided only by her instincts. Her relationship with Fuminori strongly influences her behavior, and she takes actions driven by her desire to be with him and understand his world.
Saya usually hides in the shadows and preys on creatures of all sizes, from cats to human beings, typically killing them by snapping their necks or disembowelment through some unknown means and then feasting on their internal organs. [/spoiler]
[Based on [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saya_no_uta]Wikipedia[/url] and in-game content]

name: Takahata Oumi (VN)
about:
Kouji's girlfriend and You's best friend. 
Oumi is really upset with Fuminori for giving You the cold shoulder after the accident. She's worried about how this is affecting You, who's clearly hurt by his standoffish behavior.
[Edited From [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saya_no_uta]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Tsukuba You (VN)
about:
Fuminori's club friend. 
Tsukuba had feelings for Fuminori and confessed to him through Kouji and Oumi's mediation. However, she is bewildered by Fuminori's gloomy change after the accident.
[Edited from [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Saya_no_uta]Wikipedia[/url]]

name: Tanbo Ryouko (VN)
about:
A neurosurgeon at T University Hospital and Fuminori's attending physician. She suspects Fuminori is hiding something during his weekly routine check-ups even though he physically appears to have fully recovered.
It seems Ryouko had some connection with Ougai Masahiko.
[From [url=https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/%E6%B2%99%E8%80%B6%E3%81%AE%E5%94%84]Wikipedia[/url] and official site]

name: Suzumi Hiromi (VN)
about: Yosuke's daughter.

name: Monika (VN)
about:
Monika is noted by the other characters to be smart, beautiful, confident and athletic. She is not as talkative as the other girls, but this is implied to not be through choice. She always has a calm, gentle expression and is portrayed as mature and hard-working. 
Monika had previously been a part of the Debate Club but left due to all the inner politics and drama, highlighting a desire for order, freedom of topics and friendliness. The Literature Club, which she founded after leaving the Debate Club, is very important to her. She aspires for it to be a place to showcase and grow everyone's passion for literature. Monika openly displays care and concern for her club mates, praising each member's writing style and even comparing them to famous authors and poets. 
[spoiler]Starting from Act 2, she shows a much more manipulative personality. It is revealed that Monika was self-aware all along and resented from being made into a minor role. She becomes infatuated with the player and urges them to spend more time with her. Monika begins trying to dispose of her club mates so the player is forced to choose her, after her attempts to make the other girls unlikable fail. Her desire and ambition lead her to become obsessive in this goal, highlighted by the fact that all of her poems are about the player or her epiphany. 
Despite Monika's upbeat attitude in the Literature Club, it becomes increasingly obvious that she is really sad and lonely, as a result of being aware that her whole world is just a simulation; a simulation in which she can't even achieve what is considered "happiness" (i.e. having her route completed). She fixates on the player so much because they're the only "real" thing in her life. It also does not help that, whenever someone quits the game, Monika is trapped in a hellish void of noise, lights, colors, and screams and despite not even being able to form coherent thoughts, she remembers all of it whenever the player turns on the game again. 
Later in the game, the player will be able to read Monika's Talk where she talks directly to the player, instead of the protagonist. It is shown that nothing about Monika's apparent kindness and politeness is an act, and she even offers the player some genuinely good advice from time to time.[/spoiler]
[From [url=http://doki-doki-literature-club.wikia.com/wiki/Monika]DDLC Wiki[/url]]

name: Sayori (VN)
about:
Sayori is portrayed as a talkative person, being very cheerful and kind and the archetype of a Genki Girl. She is very clumsy and notorious for finding ways to accidentally hurt herself or to drop things. However, despite being airheaded, she is rather cunning, being able to trick others just to get food. She is usually the only character, other than the protagonist, capable of breaking up arguments, and she is described as being paramount to keeping a relaxing atmosphere in the Literature Club, which becomes even more apparent [spoiler]after her suicide.[/spoiler] [url=/c64502]Monika[/url] notes that while she may look like a good leader, Sayori is usually better when it comes to dealing with people. [spoiler]She tries her best to help everyone be happy and dislikes attention directed at her well-being because she feels unworthy of anything that others have to offer her.[/spoiler]
[spoiler]Sayori's depression makes her disorganized, and she often "cannot find a reason to get out of bed in the morning"; her room, which the protagonist regularly cleaned for her, is also noted to be untidy. The protagonist notes how there hasn't been much change in her, and the changes the protagonist notices in her later are due to [url=/c64502]Monika[/url]'s interference, amplifying her depression and suicidal tendencies. Sayori also doesn't seem to think highly of herself. Her relationship with the [url=/c64506]Protagonist[/url] and other people's happiness are her main coping mechanisms since she believes that if she makes everyone else happy, she will not have a reason whatsoever to be unhappy.[/spoiler]
[Edited From [url=http://doki-doki-literature-club.wikia.com/wiki/Sayori]DDLC Wiki[/url]]

name: Yuri (VN)
about:
Yuri is mature, shy, and has trouble with social interactions. She normally thinks carefully about what she says, but she is easily flustered and will impulsively blurt things out due to nervousness then repeatedly apologize for her outbursts. 
Yuri prefers to write using complex language and layer meaning under metaphors that require detailed interpretation. Yuri's writing and reading preferences greatly contrast with Natsuki's, which can create tension between them.

name: Natsuki (VN)
about:
Natsuki is a brash, blunt, cranky, seemingly arrogant girl with a cute, softer interior as a result of insecurity, convincing [url=/c64502]Monika[/url] enough to class Natsuki as the embodiment of a tsundere. While she is impulsive and can speak without thinking, she truly cares about her friends and, even when she has obvious anger issues, doesn't enjoy fights or arguments with people. [spoiler]Over the course of the game, we see that she worries about [url=/c64504]Yuri[/url] and on one occasion, gives the [url=/c64506]Protagonist[/url] a note asking him to help [url=/c64504]Yuri[/url], fearing that if she spoke out then it would cause more arguments.[/spoiler] She is very stubborn and has a hard time expressing how she feels and what she wants. When repeatedly challenged, she often becomes awkward and tongue-tied, then aggressive, and then simply bursts into tears. 
Her cute interior also involves a love of manga and anime, particularly those in the slice-of-life genre, and baking. [spoiler]She has been known to store her manga collection in the Literature Club out of embarrassment, another reason is (hinted at) her father would be angry while the rest of the club obviously knows about her interest, she is still hesitant to talk about it.[/spoiler] Natsuki also likes cute things, like cupcakes with cat faces. She also likes poems with cuter, happier words, though her own poems are still about sad things, such as being persecuted for your hobbies. she believes that it's important to be able to express something deep with few words. Her simplistic writing style puts her at odds with [url=/c64504]Yuri[/url], who has a more extravagant style. 
Natsuki dislikes being called "cute," even when she acts as such or does cute things, and will deny any claims from others relating to this; nevertheless, she is much more comfortable exposing her sweet side once she knows people aren't going to tease her about it. she hates it if she isn't taken seriously, whether it's her writing, her hobbies, or just her overall demeanor. [spoiler]It is likely she learned to be ashamed of herself and her hobbies, because her classmates judge her and her implied abusive father, making her abrasive nature a coping mechanism. This is also implied in a secret poem, "Things I Like About Papa", which is most likely written by her. 
It is shown that she is a very lonely person who desperately craves affection. One example is during the third poetry-sharing session. If she has liked all your poems to date, she outright asks the protagonist if he thinks her poems are the best, which swiftly shifts to her begging him to say they are, even if he hates them. [/spoiler]
[Edited From [url=http://doki-doki-literature-club.wikia.com/wiki/Natsuki]DDLC Wiki[/url]]

name: Cornelia
about: Cornelia is an aide in Eiserne Jungfrau, and a third-class priest. She has a strong sense of justice, but despite her cold exterior shared by her comrades, she is quite hot-blooded in nature. Cornelia is new to Eiserne Jungfrau and is innocent and unaware of the dark side of her profession. She was chosen for her current mission specifically by Gertrude. She was chosen so that she could decide if she was the right type of person for this profession.

name: Gertrude
about: Gertrude is a senior aide in Eiserne Jungfrau, and a first-class priest. She wears a uniform similar to Cornelia's, and appears as a girl with red eyes and long blond hair. Like her comrades, she appears extremely deadpan when on duty, but is actually a very charitable character well-liked by her juniors.

name: Featherine Augustus Aurora
about: Featherine Augustus Aurora is the witch form of Hachijou Tooya (Itouikukuro Zerogonanaroku), and the Witch of Theatergoing, Drama and Spectating, an Endless Witch, and also a Creator.

name: Hachijou Ikuko
about: Hachijou Ikuko is the mystery novelist who fabricated stories about the Rokkenjima murders along with her partner Hachijou Tooya. [spoiler]She was the person who found Battler after he was passed out on a highway. She had taken him in and gave him the name Tooya.[/spoiler]

name: Dlanor A. Knox
about: Dlanor is the Chief Inquisitor of Eiserne Jungfrau and enforces the commandments of Knox's Decalogue, originally written by Ronald A. Knox. Known as Archbishop Knox, Dlanor is popularly known as "Death Sentence Dlanor" and "Dlanor of the Ten Wedges." She can summon a red blade of light, which differs from the others seen in the series by having a handle.

name: Furudo Erika
about: Erika is a young detective introduced in End of the Golden Witch. A blue-haired girl estimated to be around the age of a middle school student, she is characterized as being highly intelligent and possessing an excellent memory. She acts very polite in public, and shows an extreme interest in puzzles and mysteries. In truth, she is ruthless and cunning, and only solves mysteries to boast her superiority towards those who execute them.

name: Lynn (Manga)
about:
Lynn is a virgin from a small Village. When her village is attacked by bandits she stumbles across the sword Gram with the ghost Siegfried linked to it. Lynn falls in love with Br��nhild who saved the village in the meantime. To impress her Lynn reluctantly teams up with Siegfried to make their way to the title giving tournament.
She grew up without a family and lied out of fear of being alone, making her popular with the girls in her village. Lynn learns combat very quickly. Besides the sword Gram she uses a small axe.

name: Tyrant
about: Become a loli yourself.

about: Become a loli yourself, with swimsuit.

name: Freesia
about:
Graceful, polite, and disciplined, that's the first impression that Freesia leaves on most.
However, this illusion quickly shatters when they see her playing rock-paper-scissors with kids in all seriousness well past their bedtime.
"It is an honor to be your companion. I have much to learn from you."

name: Minova
about:
Founder and leader of the Ashwind Clan.
Minova might act all tough like a street thug, but deep down, she just wants to create a place where she and her friends truly belong. Tired of the status quo in Ash District, she's fighting to bring change with her own two hands.
"Don't worry, I got your back."

name: Mistique
about:
The "witch" of Scarlet Sights Media.
Mistique is a reporter who'll do anything to get to the truth. No trail is too cold, no scoop is too big, and no obstacle is too much.
Too big to fall? Not a problem. Powerful royalty? Not scared at all. When the witch sets her sights on you, there's nothing more you can do.
"What's all the ruckus? Is that a new scoop I spy?"

name: Nanoha
about:
A maid at the Goodwind Homecare.
"Quick and efficient, leaves no trace." This might seem like an odd remark for a maid. But when she presents you with a handmade cupcake, her innocent look dispels all doubts.
"Is there anything you wish to do together?"

name: Iris
about:
A member of the New Star Guild.
Prudent and always prepared, Iris has a plan B for every plan A. She's a quick learner and a talented diplomat, constantly helping her guild buddies with clever problem-solving.
"It's been rather hectic. Think I'll do a few quizzes to unwind."

name: Shimiao
about:
Introducing Shimiao, the diligent secretary of a Loong city's administrative organization.
Known for her strict adherence to rules, she excels in all her duties. While some see her as cold, aloof, and riding on a high horse, she's simply an introvert who wants to do everything as best as she can.
"Please double-check this proposal and get back to me."

name: Amber
about:
A member of the New Star Guild.
Silent in person but a chatterbox on her phone. It's no surprise that she has one of the fastest typing speeds!
"Why'd you leave my messages at read?"

name: Jinglin
about:
You might mistake her for an intern, but this young and capable Loong girl is the proud owner of Jing's Bistro, a franchise of Fenghuang Diner. Despite her age, she's the heart of the team, as skilled at keeping books as she is at whipping up a wicked spicy dish!
"Thank you for eating at Jing's Bistro. How's our new dish by the way?"

name: Cosette
about:
A mysterious girl with a deep obsession for vending machine drinks, she���s not the best at everyday conversation.
Despite her petite frame, her combat abilities are nothing to scoff at. Rumors swirl around her���some say she���s actually an assassin���and there may be some truth to that, given her unusual origins���
"No soft drinks at night? Alright... but what about tomorrow morning?"

name: Noya
about:
A member of the New Star Guild.
Cheerful, helpful, and unbelievably hopeful. Nothing can keep good ol' Noya down!
"Chugging Pep Pep Juice is what life's all about! Let's go!"

name: Canace
about:
Canace is a beloved lecturer at Grace Light Academy, an educational institution supported by Grace Imperium. Known for her ability to tailor her teaching to each student and for genuinely caring about their growth, she enjoys overwhelming popularity on campus. However, her passion for researching the Monolith and preparing lessons often leaves her sleep-deprived.
"How about a trade? My knowledge for your thrilling tales."

name: Ann
about:
A girl of the Flufla race who lives in Eaze Village.
Don't let her small build fool you, her determination to protect her home is as strong as can be.
"Let's be together forever, everyone!"
